card_name_verified: Wyndham Rewards Earner® Plus Card (Barclays, $75 AF) — consumer version
_review_reason: Same mechanism as biz version (already audited): all benefits points/qualitative/% discount → exclude per Convention C. 7,500 anniversary bonus points (points), Wyndham Platinum status (qualitative), 10% discount on go-free award redemptions (% discount). No USD statement credits.
